userStories.title: Add avatar_url column to users table
userStories.description: Create a migration adding a nullable `avatar_url` varchar(500) column to the `users` table. Run `npx drizzle-kit push` or equivalent to apply. Verify with: `npx tsc --noEmit` passing with no errors.

userStories.title: Expose avatar_url in GET /users/:id response
userStories.description: Update the user serializer/schema in `src/users/user.schema.ts` to include `avatar_url` in the response body. Verify with: `npx tsc --noEmit` and `npm test -- --grep 'GET /users/:id'`.

userStories.title: Accept avatar_url in PATCH /users/:id
userStories.description: Update the PATCH handler in `src/users/user.controller.ts` to accept and persist `avatar_url`. Validate it is a valid URL or null. Verify with: `npm test -- --grep 'PATCH /users/:id'`.

userStories.title: Display avatar in profile page UI
userStories.description: In `src/components/ProfilePage.tsx`, render the user's avatar using the `avatar_url` field. Fall back to initials if null. Verify with: `npm run test:e2e -- --grep 'profile page'`.
